languages.text: "Продавшаяся ксеноереси сволочь... Протокол 12.60 дробь 9, остановить наведение!" {n}Окрик заставляет ржаволовчих убрать прицелы с вашей груди. Громкий голос техножрицы становится яростней.{/n} "Предатель Декабалус обманул вас! Он низверг священное производство в ересь, и склоняет к техносхизме рабочие единицы станции. Не верьте Декабалусу! Его оскверненный код проникает в процессоры незаметно. Что он сказал вам?"

traits.locale_text: "Продавшаяся ксеноереси сволочь... Протокол 12.60 дробь 9, остановить наведение!" {n}Окрик заставляет ржаволовчих убрать прицелы с вашей груди. Громкий голос техножрицы становится яростней.{/n} "Предатель Декабалус обманул вас! Он низверг священное производство в ересь, и склоняет к техносхизме рабочие единицы станции. Не верьте Декабалусу!"

languages.text: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"
languages.original_text: "Продавшаяся ксеноереси сволочь... Протокол 12.60 дробь 9, остановить наведение!" {n}Окрик заставляет ржаволовчих убрать прицелы с вашей груди. Громкий голос техножрицы становится яростней.{/n} "Предатель Декабалус обманул вас! Он низверг священное производство в ересь, и склоняет к техносхизме рабочие единицы станции. Не верьте Декабалусу! Его оскверненный код проникает в процессоры незаметно. Что он сказал вам?"

Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

languages.text: 「異教に溺れる汚い連中…プロトコル12.60ダッシュ9、標的を解除せよ！」{n}彼女の叫びが、錆びた追跡者たちを胸から視線を離す。テクプリストの力強い声がさらに激しくなる。{/n}「裏切り者デカバルスが君たちを欺いた！彼は聖なる生産を異教に染め、技術の分裂に導いている。デカバルスを信じないこと！彼の腐敗したコードは、気づかれずに処理装置に浸透している。彼に何を言われた？」
languages.original_text: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

traits.locale_text: 「異教に溺れる汚い連中…プロトコル12.60ダッシュ9、標的を解除せよ！」{n}彼女の叫びが、錆びた追跡者たちを胸から視線を離す。テクプリストの力強い声がさらに激しくなる。{n}「裏切り者デカバルスが君たちを欺いた！彼は聖なる生産を異教に染め、技術の分裂に導いている。デカバルスを信じないこと！彼の腐敗したコードは、気づかれずに処理装置に浸透している。彼に何を言われた？」

languages.text: «Esa escoria se regodea en la xenoherejía... ¡Protocolo 12.60 guion 9, cesen el apuntado!». {n}Su grito conmina a los ferracechadores a apartar sus miras de tu pecho. La potente voz de la tecnosacerdotisa se vuelve más feroz.{/n} «¡El traidor Decabalus le ha engañado! ¡Ha sumido la sagrada producción en la herejía y lleva a las unidades de trabajo de la estación hacia un tecnocisma! Su código corrompido penetra en los procesadores sin ser detectado. ¿Qué le ha contado?».
languages.original_text: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

traits.locale_text: «Esa escoria se regodea en la xenoherejía... ¡Protocolo 12.60 guion 9, cesen el apuntado!». {n}Su grito conmina a los ferracechadores a apartar sus miras de tu pecho. La potente voz de la tecnosacerdotisa se vuelve más feroz.{/n} «¡El traidor Decabalus le ha engañado! ¡Ha sumido la sagrada producción en la herejía y lleva a las unidades de trabajo de la estación hacia un tecnocisma! Su código corrompido penetra en los procesadores sin ser detectado. ¿Qué le ha contado?».

languages.text: “那个沉溺于异形造物的渣滓……12.60-9协议，停止瞄准！”{n}她的喝令迫使锈色追踪者移开了瞄准你胸口的准星。技术神甫的声音愈发凌厉：{/n}“叛徒德卡巴洛斯欺骗了你们！他将我们神圣的生产领至异端，还引导星站的作业单位走向技术分裂。不要相信德卡巴洛斯！他的腐蚀代码能悄无声息地渗透处理器！他对你说了什么？”
languages.original_text: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

traits.locale_text: “那个沉溺于异形造物的渣滓……12.60-9协议，停止瞄准！”{n}她的喝令迫使锈色追踪者移开了瞄准你胸口的准星。技术神甫的声音愈发凌厉：{/n}“叛徒德卡巴洛斯欺骗了你们！他将我们神圣的生产领至异端，还引导星站的作业单位走向技术分裂。不要相信德卡巴洛斯！他的腐蚀代码能悄无声息地渗透处理器！他对你说了什么？”

languages.text: "Dieser verfluchte Xeno-Ketzer ... Protokoll 12.60, Strich 9, Zielerfassung einstellen!" {n}Auf ihren Befehl senken die Rostpirscher ihre Waffen. Die durchdringende Stimme der Techpriesterin wird energischer.{/n} "Der Verräter Decabalus hat Euch getäuscht! Er hat unsere heilige Produktion in Ketzerei gestürzt und führt die Arbeitseinheiten der Station in ein Tech-Schisma. Ihr dürft Decabalus nicht trauen! Sein korrumpierter Code passiert die Prozessoren unerkannt. Was hat er Euch gesagt?"
languages.original_text: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

traits.locale_text: "Dieser verfluchte Xeno-Ketzer ... Protokoll 12.60, Strich 9, Zielerfassung einstellen!" {n}Auf ihren Befehl senken die Rostpirscher ihre Waffen. Die durchdringende Stimme der Techpriesterin wird energischer.{/n} "Der Verräter Decabalus hat Euch getäuscht! Er hat unsere heilige Produktion in Ketzerei gestürzt und führt die Arbeitseinheiten der Station in ein Tech-Schisma. Ihr dürft Decabalus nicht trauen! Sein korrumpierter Code passiert die Prozessoren unerkannt. Was hat er Euch gesagt?"

languages.text: "O zeno kâfirliğinde yüzen pislik... Protokol 12.60 tire 9, hedeflemeyi durdurun!" {n}Bağırışı, Pasavcısı güruhunu nişangâhlarını göğsünden çekmeye zorluyor. Tekno Rahip'in güçlü sesi daha da sertleşiyor.{/n} "Hain Decabalus sizi kandırdı! Kutsal üretimimizi kâfirliğe sürükledi, istasyonun çalışma birimlerini tekno bölünmeye götürüyor. Decabalus'a güvenmeyin! Onun yozlaşmış kodu, işlemcilere fark edilmeden sızar. Size ne söyledi?"
languages.original_text: "That xenoheresy-wallowing scum... Protocol 12.60 dash 9, cease targeting!" {n}Her shout forces the Ruststalkers to remove their sights from your chest. The Tech-Priest's powerful voice grows fiercer.{/n} "The traitor Decabalus has deceived you! He has cast our sacred production into heresy, and is leading the station's work units into tech-schism. Do not trust Decabalus! His corrupted code penetrates the processors undetected. What did he say to you?"

traits.locale_text: "O zeno kâfirliğinde yüzen pislik... Protokol 12.60 tire 9, hedeflemeyi durdurun!" {n}Bağırışı, Pasavcısı güruhunu nişangâhlarını göğsünden çekmeye zorluyor. Tekno Rahip'in güçlü sesi daha da sertleşiyor.{/n} "Hain Decabalus sizi kandırdı! Kutsal üretimimizi kâfirliğe sürükledi, istasyonun çalışma birimlerini tekno bölünmeye götürüyor. Decabalus'a güvenmeyin! Onun yozlaşmış kodu, işlemcilere fark edilmeden sızar. Size ne söyledi?"

languages.text: « Espèce de racaille xénohérétique… Protocole 12.60 tiret 9, baissez vos armes ! » {n}Les corrôdeurs détournent leurs viseurs de votre poitrine. La voix de la technoprêtresse se fait encore plus féroce.{/n} « Décabalus le traître s'est joué de vous ! Il a fait de notre production sacrée une hérésie et pousse les unités ouvrières de la station au technoschisme. Ne lui faites pas confiance ! Son code corrompu et indétectable a déjà pénétré les processeurs. Que vous a-t-il dit ? »
